2604.13481.title: Monthly Diffusion v0.9: A Latent Diffusion Model for the First AI-MIP
2604.13481.paper_summary: Here, we describe Monthly Diffusion at 1.5-degree grid spacing (MD-1.5 version 0.9), a climate emulator that leverages a spherical Fourier neural operator (SFNO)-inspired Conditional Variational Auto-Encoder (CVAE) architecture to model the evolution of low-frequency internal atmospheric variability using latent diffusion. MDv0.9 was designed to forward-step at monthly mean timesteps in a data-sparse regime, using modest computational requirements. This work describes the motivation behind the architecture design, the MDv0.9 training procedure, and initial results.
2604.13481.paper_summary_zh: 在此，我們描述了以1.5度網格間距進行的每月擴散（MD-1.5版本0.9），這是一種氣候模擬器，利用受球面傅立葉神經運算子（SFNO）啟發的條件變分自編碼器（CVAE）架構來模擬低頻內部大氣變異的演變，使用潛在擴散。MDv0.9的設計旨在於數據稀疏的情況下，以每月平均時間步進行前向步進，並使用適度的計算需求。本研究描述了架構設計背後的動機、MDv0.9的訓練程序以及初步結果。
2604.13481.author: Kyle J. C. Hall et.al.
2604.13481.authors: Kyle J. C. Hall, Maria J. Molina
